headline: AMD entered into a strategic agreement with Meta Platforms, issuing a performance-based warrant for up to 160 million shares tied to Meta's commitment to purchase up to 6 gigawatt equivalents of AMD Instinct GPUs.
investor_impact: This agreement provides massive revenue visibility and validates AMD's AI GPU roadmap by securing Meta as a major anchor customer. Although the 160 million share warrant introduces dilution, the escalating stock price vesting thresholds up to $600 per share align Meta's incentives with AMD's long-term shareholder value creation.
key_figures: 1 gigawatt equivalent initial GPU purchase commitment
6 gigawatt equivalent GPU purchase for full vesting
$600 per share final tranche stock price threshold
